parameters.query:
=WITH preferred_store AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT c.store_id
      FROM public.carts c
      WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint
        AND c.status = 'active'
      ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    (
      SELECT s.store_id
      FROM public.stores s
      ORDER BY COALESCE(s.onboarding_step, 0) DESC, s.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, s.store_id DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )
  ) AS store_id
),
store_config AS (
  SELECT enable_pricing FROM public.stores ORDER BY store_id LIMIT 1
)
SELECT i.store_id, i.sku, i.item_name, i.price, i.stock, i.unit, i.category, i.is_active,
  similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}') AS sim_primary,
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' THEN similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}') ELSE 0 END AS sim_secondary,
  sc.enable_pricing
FROM public.inventory i
CROSS JOIN preferred_store ps
CROSS JOIN store_config sc
WHERE i.is_active = true
  AND i.stock > 0
  AND (ps.store_id IS NULL OR i.store_id = ps.store_id)
  AND (
    ('{{ $json.sku_sql }}' <> '' AND i.sku = '{{ $json.sku_sql }}')
    OR similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}') > 0.12
    OR ('{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' AND similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}') > 0.12)
    OR lower(i.item_name) ILIKE '%{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}%'
    OR ('{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' AND lower(i.item_name) ILIKE '%{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}%')
  )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN '{{ $json.sku_sql }}' <> '' AND i.sku = '{{ $json.sku_sql }}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
  GREATEST(
    similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}'),
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' THEN similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}') ELSE 0 END
  ) DESC
LIMIT 25;

=SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition), 0) AS total
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }} AND c.status = 'active';

=WITH expire AS (
  UPDATE public.carts SET status = 'expired'
  WHERE user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint AND status = 'active'
    AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  RETURNING cart_id AS expired_id
),
create_if_none AS (
  INSERT INTO public.carts (user_id, store_id, status, created_at, updated_at)
  SELECT
    {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint,
    {{ Number($('Pick Best Match').first().json.store_id || 0) }},
    'active',
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.carts
    WHERE user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint AND status = 'active'
  )
  RETURNING cart_id
)
SELECT COALESCE(
  (SELECT cart_id FROM create_if_none LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT cart_id FROM public.carts WHERE user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1)
) AS cart_id;

=INSERT INTO public.cart_items (cart_id, sku, quantity, price_at_addition, added_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Upsert Cart').first().json.cart_id }}',
  '{{ $('Pick Best Match').first().json.sku }}',
  {{ $('Pick Best Match').first().json.requested_quantity || 1 }},
  {{ $('Pick Best Match').first().json.price }},
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (cart_id, sku) DO UPDATE
  SET quantity = cart_items.quantity + EXCLUDED.quantity,
      price_at_addition = EXCLUDED.price_at_addition
RETURNING cart_id, sku, quantity;

=SELECT ci.sku, i.item_name, ci.quantity, ci.price_at_addition,
  (ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition) AS line_total
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku
JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id
WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }} AND c.status = 'active'
ORDER BY ci.added_at;

=WITH preferred_store AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT c.store_id
      FROM public.carts c
      WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint
        AND c.status = 'active'
      ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, c.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 1
    ),
    (
      SELECT s.store_id
      FROM public.stores s
      ORDER BY COALESCE(s.onboarding_step, 0) DESC, s.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, s.store_id DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )
  ) AS store_id

store_config AS (
  SELECT enable_pricing FROM public.stores ORDER BY store_id LIMIT 1

SELECT i.store_id, i.sku, i.item_name, i.price, i.stock, i.unit, i.category, i.is_active,
  similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}') AS sim_primary,
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' THEN similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}') ELSE 0 END AS sim_secondary,
  sc.enable_pricing
FROM public.inventory i
CROSS JOIN preferred_store ps
CROSS JOIN store_config sc
WHERE i.is_active = true
  AND i.stock > 0
  AND (ps.store_id IS NULL OR i.store_id = ps.store_id)
  AND (
    ('{{ $json.sku_sql }}' <> '' AND i.sku = '{{ $json.sku_sql }}')
    OR similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}') > 0.12
    OR ('{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' AND similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}') > 0.12)
    OR lower(i.item_name) ILIKE '%{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}%'
    OR ('{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' AND lower(i.item_name) ILIKE '%{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}%')
  )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN '{{ $json.sku_sql }}' <> '' AND i.sku = '{{ $json.sku_sql }}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
  GREATEST(
    similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.primary_search_sql }}'),
    CASE WHEN '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}' <> '' THEN similarity(lower(i.item_name), '{{ $json.secondary_search_sql }}') ELSE 0 END
  ) DESC
LIMIT 25;

VALUES (

  {{ $('Pick Best Match').first().json.requested_quantity || 1 }},

=SELECT ci.sku, i.item_name, ci.quantity, ci.price_at_addition,
  (ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition) AS line_total
FROM public.cart_items ci
JOIN public.inventory i ON ci.sku = i.sku

WHERE c.user_id = {{ $('Normalize Search Term').first().json.chat_id }} AND c.status = 'active'
ORDER BY ci.added_at;
